## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issues (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat/`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs/`)
- [ ] Chore / tooling (`chore/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets `dev` (not `main`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (for any user-visible change)
- [ ] I tested these changes on the iOS Simulator
- [ ] No design tokens were hardcoded (used `src/theme/`)
